Package microui.component

Class Scroll

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
microui.core.RangeControl
microui.core.LinearRangeControl
microui.component.Scroll
All Implemented Interfaces:
Scrollable, Visible
public class Scroll extends LinearRangeControl
A scrollbar component with a draggable thumb for selecting values within a range. The Scroll extends LinearRangeControl to provide linear scrolling functionality with both horizontal and vertical orientations.

The scrollbar consists of a track and a draggable thumb. The thumb's size is determined by the thumbSizeRatio, which represents the proportion of the track that the thumb occupies.

Users can drag the thumb along the track to change the value, and the thumb provides visual feedback through hover and ripple effects.

  • Constructor Details

    • Scroll

      public Scroll(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Constructs a Scroll with specified position and dimensions. The scrollbar is initialized with a thumb button, default styling, and a thumb size ratio of 0.1 (10% of the track).
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the scrollbar's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the scrollbar's top-left corner
      w - the width of the scrollbar
      h - the height of the scrollbar

    • Scroll

      public Scroll()
      Constructs a Scroll with default maximum size, centered on the screen. This is a convenience constructor for creating a centered scrollbar.

  • Method Details

    • swapOrientation

      public void swapOrientation()
      Swaps the orientation of the scrollbar (horizontal to vertical or vice versa). Updates the thumb position and dimensions accordingly.
      Overrides:
      swapOrientation in class LinearRangeControl

    • isThumbClicked

      public final boolean isThumbClicked()
      Checks if the thumb is currently being clicked.
      Returns:
      true if the thumb is being clicked, false otherwise

    • getThumbRipplesColor

      public final AbstractColor getThumbRipplesColor()
      Gets the color of the ripple effects on the thumb.
      Returns:
      the current thumb ripple color

      public final void setThumbRipplesColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the color of the ripple effects on the thumb.
      Parameters:
      color - the color to use for thumb ripple effects

    • isThumbRipplesEnabled

      public final boolean isThumbRipplesEnabled()
      Checks if ripple effects are enabled on the thumb.
      Returns:
      true if thumb ripple effects are enabled, false otherwise

    • setThumbRipplesEnabled

      public final void setThumbRipplesEnabled(boolean isEnabled)
      Enables or disables ripple effects on the thumb.
      Parameters:
      isEnabled - true to enable ripple effects, false to disable

      Gets the background color of the thumb.
      Returns:

      public final void setThumbColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the background color of the thumb.
      Parameters:
      color - the background color for the thumb

    • getCalculatedThumbSize

      public final float getCalculatedThumbSize()
      Gets the calculated size of the thumb based on the thumbSizeRatio and orientation. For horizontal scrollbars, returns width Г— thumbSizeRatio. For vertical scrollbars, returns height Г— thumbSizeRatio.
      Returns:
      the calculated thumb size in pixels

    • setThumbSizeRatio

      public final void setThumbSizeRatio(float thumbSizeRatio)
      Sets the ratio that determines the thumb size relative to the track. The thumbSizeRatio must be between 0 and 1 inclusive.
      Parameters:
      thumbSizeRatio - the ratio of thumb size to track size (0 to 1)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if thumbSizeRatio is less than 0 or greater than 1
